ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the regulation applies to */,
  "statutory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the regulation is statutory */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the legal document or statute */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Geographic area or jurisdiction where the regulation applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation the record is associated with */,
  "record_name" TEXT /* Name of the record */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the record */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period for the record */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the record */,
  "legal_requirements" TEXT /* Detailed description of any legal or statutory requirements associated with the record */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the entry belongs to */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "entry_description" TEXT /* Description of the entry */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of the entry (e.g., inspection, audit) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the entry */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_entries_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for overseeing the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the record (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the check is associated with */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "check_result" INTEGER /* Result of the compliance check (true for compliant, false for non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the compliance check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the compliance check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used to perform the compliance check (e.g., on-site inspection, document review) */,
  "evidence_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file that serves as evidence of compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_evidence_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("evidence_file_id") REFERENCES document_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the action is associated with */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document file */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_files_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the notification is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
